name: Vidalia Sweet Onion Chicken Breast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Large chicken breast, split and boned
2 Medium-sized Vidalia sweet onions, peeled and sliced
1 can (10 3/4-oz) cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken breast in oil and drain on paper towel.
2. Heat a 1 1/2-quart casserole over medium heat until lightly coated with oil.
3. Layer potatoes at the bottom of the casserole.
4. Add a layer of onions on top of the potatoes.
5. Spread a layer of mushroom soup evenly over the onions.
6. Gently place the chicken breast over the soup and sprinkle paprika on top.
7. Cover tightly and bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
